description: CompositionBlue jeans with a washed look, made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has a flat front with two insert pockets, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, comfortable waistband with belt loops, brand patch on the waistband at the back, and a button and zipper closure on the frontFitSlim fit High riseWash careWash inside out separately in mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThe manually treated denim with a heavy washed and creased look adds unique styling to this pair of blue jeans from spykar, while the cotton and spandex fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day and stretches well to help you move with ease. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers.Model statisticsProduct is a size 32 on a model of height 5'8& rdquo and waist 28"
